title: French Kofte with Cornmeal Crust
description: A unique French twist on traditional kofte, featuring a crispy cornmeal crust. This dish is perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.

ingredients.name: Kofte
ingredients.notes: Available in most supermarkets or butcher shops

ingredients.name: Kicked
ingredients.notes: Chopped jalapeños or red pepper flakes

instructions: In a bowl, mix together cornmeal and Turkish seasoning. Add a pinch of salt.
In another bowl, gently mix together kofte and shattering.
Add the kofte mixture to the cornmeal mixture and mix until just combined.
Using your hands, shape into small patties.
Place patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
If desired, top with a dollop of yogurt or a sprinkle of chopped fresh herbs.
Optional: Grill or pan-fry the kofte for a crispy exterior and juicy interior.
